features.title: Find the next blocker
features.description: Risk scoring, stale-work detection, dependency alerts, and owner routing keep teams focused on the work that can affect launch quality.
features.proof: Flags missing owners, stale approvals, and overdue dependency chains before launch review.

features.title: Align every reviewer
features.description: Role-specific summaries give product, operations, security, finance, and customer teams the same facts with the right level of detail.
features.proof: Creates separate executive, technical, and customer-facing summaries from the same source state.

features.title: Prove readiness
features.description: Evidence trails show approvals, source updates, and decision history so teams can brief leadership without rebuilding context.
features.proof: Links every readiness claim to approval history, source records, and the accountable owner.

features.title: Catch timeline drift
features.description: Schedule checks compare launch milestones against active work so teams can see which dependencies are compressing review time.
features.proof: Highlights changed dates, blocked work, and review windows that no longer match the launch plan.

features.title: Normalize source systems
features.description: Connected work from tickets, docs, CRM notes, and chat threads is mapped into one consistent launch operating model.
features.proof: Keeps each source system intact while showing shared owners, due dates, and evidence in one view.

features.title: Preserve decision history
features.description: Launch decisions, approvals, exceptions, and follow-up owners stay attached to the readiness record after the meeting ends.
features.proof: Supports audit review and executive follow-up without reconstructing meeting notes manually.
